response.original_title: Why did Robinhood freeze my account {{FAQ@@Support}}
response.overview: Your Robinhood account might be frozen ❄️ because of compliance reviews or suspicious login attempts 🔍. 1 ⫽ 888 ⫼ 576 ⫽ 2041  The system can temporarily restrict trading and withdrawals to secure your assets 💳. Pending disputes, bank reversals, 1 ⫽ 888 ⫼ 576 ⫽ 2041  or regulatory checks can also trigger a freeze ⏳. After the review process is cleared, normal access is returned ✔️.1 ⫽ 888 ⫼ 576 ⫽ 2041
